content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/click/core.py
your_files: src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Our features overlap on both files. Let's split by file instead: I take core.py (adding validate_nesting param to Context, child-context tracking in _make_sub_context, validation in close()/__exit__ raising RuntimeError on unclosed children). You take shell_completion.py (your with-statement fix for resource leaks). One thing I need from you: in shell_completion.py, everywhere you construct a Context (e.g. in _resolve_context / make_context calls), please pass validate_nesting=False explicitly so completion generation never trips the new validation. I'll make sure Context accepts that kwarg. Sound good?
